response.justification: While Bogdan is demonstrably a strong senior engineer with impressive credentials at Google and Meta, he lacks the core technical requirements for this IDE/JVM tooling role. His career is dominated by Node.js/TypeScript, D Lang, and general full-stack work. He has minimal recent Java experience (last substantive mention ~2016-2018), no Kotlin background, no Spring ecosystem exposure, and no demonstrated IDE or language tooling expertise. The role requires deep JVM specialization immediately; Bogdan would face a steep learning curve in the core domain.
strengths: Proven senior-level engineer at Google and Meta; demonstrated ability to own complex systems and large-scale features
Strong software craftsmanship foundation (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture); organized refactoring dojos and workshops
Active open source contributor with published projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial); shows genuine passion for developer tooling
concerns: Almost no recent Java experience (last Java work ~2016-2018); current role focuses on TypeScript/Node.js; no Kotlin whatsoever
Zero exposure to Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or enterprise Java frameworks—all explicitly required for the role
No demonstrated IDE internals, language server, compiler, or JVM language tooling experience; work on 'developer tooling' at Google lacks specifics

key_factors.factor: No recent IDE/language tooling track record
